title: New Solid Dusk Theme for Jade
description: Modern dark style UI for Jade.
body:
![ui sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a05e8f76aa4a9bfcb08d02fc777ac4d121f456d.png)

**[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)** is a mod by [Snownee](https://modrinth.com/user/Snownee), this small pack only changes the Jade **GUI** to give it a more modern, smooth and minimalistic look. This is a slightly dark (greyish) version of my [New Solid Light Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-solid-theme-for-jade). If you're looking for a darker version, you can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-solid-dark-theme-for-jade)

# HOW TO INSTALL
Download the correct version for you. Copy the file into the Minecraft installation folder inside "resourcepacks". Enable it by selecting it from the resource packs menu on the game sttings.
It should activate when you do this. However, if it does not, open Jade settings (maybe through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) and enable it there manually in: Mod Settings/Appearance/Theme.

# **MY OTHER PACKS**
- [New Solid Dark Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-solid-dark-theme-for-jade)
- [New Solid Light Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-solid-theme-for-jade)
- [Greek Tile Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/greek-tile-theme-for-jade)
- [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
